scope: targeted re-benchmark of the 5 weak spots tracked after iteration-2 (evals 7, 9, 11, 19, 23) plus eval 1 as a regression guard. 1 run per eval, with-skill arm only. Baseline and the other 20 evals are carried over from iteration-2 (3x).
skill_changes: Narrowed Gate A hard-stop to the four single load-bearing statements only (positioning, value prop, messaging hierarchy, brand voice). ICPs, content calendars, campaign briefs and launch/GTM plans are now deliver-first.
Reframed big working documents (calendar, launch plan, ICP/persona) as deliver-first with a stated-assumptions block; ICP/persona must be flagged as a hypothesis pending real customer evidence.
Honesty rule now requires writing the full deliverable with clearly-marked proof placeholders instead of withholding.
Added a non-negotiable callout to references/measurement.md: every measurement deliverable must include the vanity-metrics warning and the attribution-is-imperfect caveat.

headline.note: Projected suite mean substitutes the 6 re-run evals into the iteration-2 with-skill table; assumes the untouched 20 evals hold their iteration-2 3x scores.

caveats: 1 run per eval (1x), not the 3x averaging used for the iteration-2 headline.

Run on claude-opus-4-8; iteration-2 used claude-sonnet-4-6, so the with-skill delta conflates the skill edit with a model change. The targeted failures were caused by over-gating and missing caveats, which the skill edits directly address and the new outputs visibly contain.
Outputs were produced and graded in the same session rather than via an independent harness grader.
